Operation 'disassociateRepository' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary uses PascalCase operation name instead of action-oriented language. Description lacks clarity about what happens after disassociation, what is returned, and the permanence of the action. Added details about the effect on code analysis, return value, and irreversibility for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Removes the association between Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer and a repository.
data.summary_suggestion: Remove repository association from CodeGuru Reviewer
data.description_suggestion: Removes the association between Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer and a repository, identified by the AssociationArn. After disassociation, CodeGuru Reviewer will no longer analyze code in the repository. Returns the disassociated repository association details. This action cannot be undone without creating a new association.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses PascalCase operation name instead of action-oriented language. Description lacks clarity about what happens after disassociation, what is returned, and the permanence of the action. Added details about the effect on code analysis, return value, and irreversibility for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'listRecommendationFeedback' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_context. Original summary uses PascalCase operation name. Description is misleading - it suggests returning feedback for 'all users' when it actually retrieves feedback for a specific code review. Added clarity about the CodeReviewArn requirement, pagination support, and filtering capabilities to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns a list of RecommendationFeedbackSummary objects that contain customer recommendation feedback for all CodeGuru Reviewer users.
data.summary_suggestion: List recommendation feedback for code review
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of RecommendationFeedbackSummary objects containing customer feedback for recommendations in a specific code review, identified by CodeReviewArn. Supports pagination via MaxResults and NextToken parameters. Feedback includes customer reactions and comments on CodeGuru Reviewer recommendations. Results can be filtered by recommendation ID if needed.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses PascalCase operation name. Description is misleading - it suggests returning feedback for 'all users' when it actually retrieves feedback for a specific code review. Added clarity about the CodeReviewArn requirement, pagination support, and filtering capabilities to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'listRecommendations' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_context. Original summary uses PascalCase operation name. Description lacks details about what information each recommendation contains and pagination support. Added specifics about recommendation content (defect type, severity, location, fix), pagination, and the requirement for completed code review status to help AI agents understand the operation's output.

data.current_description: Returns the list of all recommendations for a completed code review.
data.summary_suggestion: List recommendations from completed code review
data.description_suggestion: Returns the list of all recommendations generated by CodeGuru Reviewer for a completed code review, identified by CodeReviewArn. Each recommendation includes the defect type, severity, location in code, and suggested fix. Supports pagination via MaxResults and NextToken parameters. Only returns recommendations from code reviews with completed analysis status.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses PascalCase operation name. Description lacks details about what information each recommendation contains and pagination support. Added specifics about recommendation content (defect type, severity, location, fix), pagination, and the requirement for completed code review status to help AI agents understand the operation's output.

data.current_description: Adds one or more tags to an associated repository.
data.description_suggestion: Adds one or more tags to an associated repository resource identified by its ARN. Tags are key-value pairs that help organize and manage repository associations. data.current_description: Removes a tag from an associated repository.

data.current_description: Stores customer feedback for a CodeGuru Reviewer recommendation. When this API is called again with different reactions the previous feedback is overwritten.
data.description_suggestion: Stores customer feedback for a specific CodeGuru Reviewer recommendation identified by CodeReviewArn and RecommendationId. Feedback includes customer reactions (e.g., ThumbsUp, ThumbsDown) and optional comments. If feedback already exists for the recommendation, calling this operation again with different reactions overwrites the previous feedback. Returns confirmation of stored feedback. Feedback is used to improve CodeGuru Reviewer's analysis accuracy.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses PascalCase operation name. message: Operation 'associateRepository' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is just a verb phrase without context. Description is verbose and mixes procedural guidance with operational details. Improved summary adds 'with CodeGuru Reviewer' for clarity. Improved description consolidates key information: supported repository types, requirements, return value, and important limitations for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Use to associate an Amazon Web Services CodeCommit repository or a repository managed by Amazon Web Services CodeStar Connections with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer. When you associate a repository, CodeGuru Reviewer reviews source code changes in the repository's pull requests and provides automatic recommendations. You can view recommendations using the CodeGuru Reviewer console. For more information, see Recommendations in Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer in the Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer User Guide. If you associate a CodeCommit or S3 repository, it must be in the same Amazon Web Services Region and Amazon Web Services account where its CodeGuru Reviewer code reviews are configured. Bitbucket and GitHub Enterprise Server repositories are managed by Amazon Web Services CodeStar Connections to connect to CodeGuru Reviewer. For more information, see Associate a repository in the Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer User Guide. You cannot use the CodeGuru Reviewer SDK or the Amazon Web Services CLI to associate a GitHub repository with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer. To associate a GitHub repository, use the console. For more information, see Getting started with CodeGuru Reviewer in the CodeGuru Reviewer User Guide.
data.description_suggestion: Associates an AWS CodeCommit, S3, Bitbucket, or GitHub Enterprise Server repository with Amazon CodeGuru Reviewer to enable automated code reviews and recommendations. Requires the repository to be in the same AWS Region and account (for CodeCommit/S3). Returns a RepositoryAssociation object containing the association ARN and status. Note: GitHub repositories must be associated via the console, not via API.
data.reasoning: Original summary is just a verb phrase without context. Description is verbose and mixes procedural guidance with operational details. Improved summary adds 'with CodeGuru Reviewer' for clarity. Improved description consolidates key information: supported repository types, requirements, return value, and important limitations for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Use to create a code review with a CodeReviewType of RepositoryAnalysis. This type of code review analyzes all code under a specified branch in an associated repository. PullRequest code reviews are automatically triggered by a pull request.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a code review of type RepositoryAnalysis to analyze all code under a specified branch in an associated repository. Requires an associated repository and branch specification. Returns a CodeReview object containing the review ARN and initial status. Note: PullRequest code reviews are automatically triggered and cannot be created manually.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks specificity about the code review type. Description explains the operation but omits return value details. Improved summary specifies 'repository analysis' to clarify the operation's scope. Improved description adds return value information and clarifies that only RepositoryAnalysis type can be manually created.
